channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: What is 'classified' information? What are 'secure' communications? Here's a primer
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration's use of a popular messaging app to discuss sensitive military plans — with a journalist on the text chain — is raising questions about security and the importance of safeguarding the nation's secrets.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlights AI copyright concerns
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Earth’s storage of water in soil, lakes and rivers is dwindling. And it’s especially bad for farming
item.description: New research finds that global warming has significantly reduced the amount of water that’s being stored around the world in soil, lakes, rivers, snow and other places on land.
item.dc:creator: Melina Walling, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Los Angeles sheriff's department to retest 4,000 DNA samples after using faulty kits for 8 months
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Department said this week it will retest 4,000 DNA samples and open an internal investigation after learning that it used potentially flawed test kits for eight months.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Everything new on Netflix in April 2025 – including Black Mirror season 7 and Love on the Spectrum
item.description: Excited for Black Mirror season 7? It's just one of the many new movies and shows arriving on Netflix in April 2025.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: I'm not waiting for a dedicated Xbox handheld any longer thanks to the new Backbone One: Xbox Edition
item.description: The Backbone One: Xbox Edition, an Xbox version of the excellent mobile controller, has been revealed.
item.dc:creator: dash.wood@futurenet.com (Dashiell Wood), TechRadar

item.title: Digital Infrastructure Summit analiza las mejores prácticas en infraestructura TI
item.description: El irrefrenable avance tecnológico empuja a las organizaciones a adaptar continuamente sus operaciones y tácticas empresariales aprovechando para ello el poder de las tecnologías de vanguardia.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Teams successful on 52.2% of ball/strike challenges during spring training robot umpire test
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Teams won 52.2% of their ball/strike challenges during the spring training test of robot umpires, and catchers had a markedly better success rate than pitchers.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Microsoft Unveils Hyperlight Wasm: A Virtual Machine for WebAssembly Component Workloads
item.description: Microsoft has introduced Hyperlight Wasm, a virtual machine "micro-guest" that can run WebAssembly component workloads in various languages, including C and Python.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Misinformation expert encouraged picket lines at Tesla sites to protest DOGE cuts. Then came the online threats
item.description: (CNN) — Sociologist Joan Donovan rarely looks at social media posts about herself on X anymore. She already knows what’s being said.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Canada bars Tesla from rebate program over Trump tariffs
item.description: Canada has barred electric vehicle (EV) giant Tesla from all of its rebate programs and banned the Texas-based automotive company from future electric vehicle rebate programs over President Trump’s tariff back-and-forth with Ottawa.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Red Hat’s AI portfolio evolves to address enterprise deployment challenges
item.description: Red Hat announced updates to Red Hat OpenShift AI and Red Hat Enterprise Linux AI (RHEL AI), with a goal of addressing the high costs and technical complexity of scaling AI beyond pilot projects into full deployment.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Graham: 'Very sensitive information' included in group chat
item.description: Sen. Lindsey Graham has acknowledged that "very sensitive information" was discussed among high-level officials via messaging app Signal, but sees the snafu as a "lessons learned" episode.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Crisp, The Hill

item.title: Signalgate: There’s an IT lesson here
item.description: You know how IT admins are always warning employees about best practices for security? They’re always mandating which apps to use, which to avoid and which devices can safely connect to corporate networks.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: GameStop adopts policy to buy Bitcoin, joining other firms
item.description: GameStop Corp., the struggling video-game retailer that became a favorite of retail traders during the meme stock frenzy in 2021, said its board has approved a plan to add Bitcoin as a treasury reserve asset.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: This watchdog is tracking how AI firms are quietly backing off their safety pledges
item.description: The companies racing to own the AI future have built their technologies and businesses by carefully keeping track of you and your data.
item.dc:creator: Jackie Snow, Fast Company

item.title: Cyprus to fund desalination plants at hotels to reduce impact of water shortages on tourism
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Cyprus said Wednesday it plans to subsidize construction of private desalination plants at hotels to ensure the tourism-reliant island nation has enough fresh water too see it through busy summer seasons when the demands of millions of visitors put a severe strain on dwindling
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No application can eliminate human error: Signal’s head defends the app
item.description: When the editor-in-chief of The Atlantic, Jeff Goldberg, was accidentally added to a Signal conversation, things took a surprising turn.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: AI study buddies are boosting grades to new heights
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Vibe coding is groovy
item.description: Vibe coding is most definitely having a moment. Don’t feel bad if you haven’t heard of it—the Wikipedia page for it just went up on March 15 of this year.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Review: The new M4 MacBook Air is even better for business
item.description: Beneath the hyperbole around Apple Intelligence and intensifying regulation, you might have missed that Apple recently introduced a new MacBook Air equipped with an M4 chip. It’s a compelling upgrade to the world’s best-selling laptop, and I’ve had time to put it through its paces.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: World Backup Day: A Reminder of the Importance of Data Security
item.description: World Backup Day is March 31st, a day to remind us of the importance of data security and backups. But it's not just about backing up - it's about making sure your business stays running in real-time.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: DoorDash to offer eat first, pay later option to customers
item.description: DoorDash and Klarna are partnering to offer consumers a buy now, pay later option when ordering food delivery.
item.dc:creator: Alicia Nieves, NewsNation

item.title: Radical new tech brings flying cars closer to reality
item.description: With six cyclorotors, the BlackBird from CycloTech is designed to take off and land vertically, move sideways, brake mid-air and even parallel park.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
